text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, how did you like our birthday celebration,
Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! The Itty Bitty Critters Petting Zoo possessed
destructive power beyond all imagining!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They were all so cute, weren't they? They had
bunnies, squirrels, and guinea pigs too...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes! To think there was such a place on this
earth...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
N-now, I know it was my birthday, but do you
think it was okay for me to have them all to
myself?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You two must have wanted to show the critters
some love too, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Right. Getting to see our adorable Yaeno
enjoying her time with the critters was more than
enough.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Y-you jest! I am far too uncouth to be deserving
of that word!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't think that's true at all. Even the way you're
getting all flustered now is cute too.
